name: Patient 45
history: Relationships sometimes shift to romantic connections. Past conflict after expressions of anger. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
unlovable_belief: I am too much for people
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll always be alone because I can't regulate my emotions.
coping_strategies: Emotional suppression followed by explosion, over-apologizing, relationship sabotage.
situation: Incident at social gathering resulted in emotional outburst among friends.
auto_thought: "I ruined everything. They'll never forgive me. I'm toxic."
behavior: Leaves gathering abruptly, sends lengthy apology texts, avoids friends for weeks.
